final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for the "RAN QIU" brand (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs an Eastern aesthetic with minimalist, natural-poetic, warm-healing direction — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include ample white space as a core visual element
Subject: must include the "RAN QIU" brand logo/wordmark as focal element
Scene/backdrop: must include natural elements with warm autumn atmosphere
Lighting/mood: needs a golden-hour warm atmosphere with shallow depth-of-field feel — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must include #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red), #E8DCCB (beige), #D4A574 (golden brown) as primary colors
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve brand color hex values exactly; must maintain poetic and tranquil visual experience
Avoid:
